title: Implement Asset Management in Ticks
description: Implement the API endpoints to create, read, and update assets (Scenes, NPCs) within a specific tick. Changes to an asset must automatically cascade forward to all subsequent ticks.
ai_instructions: Follow TDD. Create endpoints like 'POST /ticks/:id/assets' and 'PUT /ticks/:id/assets/:asset_id'. The core logic is updating the asset's state for the specified tick and then applying that same change to the asset in all future ticks.
execution_steps: Add tests to 'tests/timeline.test.ts' for asset management.
Test asset creation within a tick.
Test that updating an asset in one tick cascades the changes to future ticks.
Run tests to see them fail.
Add the protected routes for asset management.
Implement the logic for creating/updating assets and cascading state.
Run tests to verify the implementation.
Add '@trace TASK-016' to all modified files.
definition_of_done: API endpoints for creating and updating assets within a tick are functional.
Changes made to an asset in a tick are correctly persisted.
State changes are automatically cascaded to the same asset in all subsequent ticks.
All tests for the asset management feature pass.
